name: Iso11783IL_OPEnableObject
title: Iso11783IL_OPEnableObject
syntax: long Iso11783IL_OPEnableObject( dword objectID, dword enable ); // form 1
description: The function activates or deactivates an input object. A Enable Object command is sent to the Virtual Terminal.

parameters.name: objectID
parameters.description: object ID of an input object
